page.title: Agent
page.description: Configure how your AI receptionist behaves, what it knows, and how it handles calls and messages.

basicSettings.title: Basic Settings
basicSettings.description: Greeting and default language for your receptionist.

knowledge.title: Knowledge
knowledge.description: Information and guidelines your receptionist uses to answer questions.
knowledge.addKnowledgeDescription: Add opening hours, pricing, FAQs, or any other information your receptionist should know.

title.label: Title
title.hint: A short, descriptive title for this piece of knowledge.

content.label: Content
content.placeholder: We are open Monday to Friday from 9am to 5pm.
content.hint: The actual information the receptionist should use.

tags.label: Tags (optional)
tags.hint: Comma-separated keywords to help categorize this knowledge.

greeting.label: Greeting
greeting.hint: The opening line your receptionist uses when answering a call or starting a conversation.

defaultLanguage.label: Default language
defaultLanguage.hint: The language the receptionist starts with before detecting the caller's preference.

empty.description: Create a business first, then return here to configure your AI receptionist.
